[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101010000 3
1 0110100110 5
2 1010100000 3
3 1010001011 5
4 0100001010 3
5 1010000101 4
6 0111000100 4
7 1110110100 6

01 10 1111110101 8
12 21 1111110111 9
23 32 1011100110 6
34 43 1010101011 6
45 54 1110001011 6
56 65 1110001111 7
67 76 1111000101 6
70 07 1111110100 7

02 20 1111110110 8
13 31 1111110101 8
24 42 1011101111 8
35 53 1110101010 6
46 64 1010001111 6
57 75 0111001110 6
60 06 1110110101 7
71 17 1111010101 7

03 30 1110110100 6 match 7
14 41 1111011111 9
25 52 0111101110 7
36 63 1010100101 5
47 74 1111001111 8
50 05 1110111110 8
61 16 1111010101 7
72 27 0111100110 6

04 40 1110111111 9
15 51 1101011111 8
26 62 1011100111 7
37 73 1111100100 6
